Author: OmegaJackie
Name: CineSync
Punchline: Self-hosted synced in-world media screens for movie nights.
Description: Host a small server; paired friends connect and automatically see the in-world screens (TVs) you create, all playing the same media. Move/resize/rotate gizmo, LibVLC video, auto-reconnect. Pairs with a self-hosted Owncast stream.
Changelog: Gizmo no longer leaks clicks to the game (stops FFXIV menu sounds while editing a screen).
